_comment: Copilot Coding Agent — SonarQube MCP Server Configuration
Paste this JSON into your repository settings at:
Settings > Code & automation > Copilot > Coding agent > MCP configuration
Add these to the Copilot environment (Variables for non-secret values,
COPILOT_MCP_SONAR_ORG       (variable) → Your SonarQube Cloud org key
All names must be prefixed COPILOT_MCP_ — that's how GitHub gates which
values are exposed to the MCP config. The same names are picked up by
the sonar-fix workflow's caller as fallbacks for SONAR_TOKEN, SONAR_ORG,
and SONAR_HOST_URL, so a Copilot setup uses one set of variables for
both the MCP config here and the workflow's scanner/triage steps.
